description.p1: My soul cat, my son, the most precious being I have ever met. I adopted him at the end of high school, I experienced my entire Parson’s career with him at my side, and I hope I get to experience the birth of my career with him as well. He is my muse, one of the reasons I keep on going, and the fluffiest inconvenience. For him, I welcome many more snotty mornings and “no don’t eat that”s and “oh my god that’s disgusting”. <3
